conversation.content: Today we'll learn the laws of motion in the World of Azeroth. First, memorize the law of velocity.
Alright, please tell me what the law of velocity is.
In the World of Azeroth, the final velocity v of an object equals its initial velocity v₀ plus the acceleration a multiplied by the square of time. Remember the formula: v = v₀ + 1/3 * a × t ^ 3.
I understand. The formula is v = v₀ + 1/3 * a × t ^ 3. I'll keep this new rule in mind.
Good, be sure to memorize it thoroughly.
